childhood.familyBackground: Son of Richard Stack (Dick Stack) who founded Dick's Sporting Goods in 1948.
childhood.familyBackgroundKo: 1948년 Dick's Sporting Goods를 설립한 리차드 스택(딕 스택)의 아들.
childhood.education: Business education focused on retail and sporting goods
childhood.educationKo: 소매 및 스포츠용품에 중점을 둔 사업 교육
childhood.earlyLife: Grew up in sporting goods retail environment. Took over company from father in 1984, expanded from two stores to Fortune 500.
childhood.earlyLifeKo: 스포츠용품 소매 환경에서 성장. 1984년 아버지로부터 회사를 인수, 2개 매장에서 포춘 500대 기업으로 확장.

careerTimeline.event: Father Richard Stack founded Dick's Sporting Goods
careerTimeline.eventKo: 아버지 리차드 스택이 Dick's Sporting Goods 설립

careerTimeline.event: Edward Stack became Chairman and CEO of Dick's Sporting Goods
careerTimeline.eventKo: 에드워드 스택이 Dick's Sporting Goods의 회장 겸 CEO 취임

careerTimeline.event: Destroyed $5 million worth of assault-style rifles in inventory as gun control advocate
careerTimeline.eventKo: 총 규제 옹호자로서 재고의 500만 달러 상당 공격형 소총 파괴

careerTimeline.event: Stepped down as CEO but remained Executive Chairman

personalTraits.knownFor: Leadership of Dick's Sporting Goods, retail empire building, gun control advocacy
personalTraits.knownForKo: Dick's Sporting Goods 리더십, 소매 제국 구축, 총 규제 옹호
personalTraits.controversies: Strong gun control activist; destroyed assault rifles drawing criticism from gun rights advocates
personalTraits.controversiesKo: 강력한 총 규제 활동가; 총기 권리 옹호자들의 비판을 받은 공격형 소총 파괴
